_about: Role occupants for the Orchestration Fabric (SPEC WS-A). The occupant of every role is DATA here, never code. Swapping a vendor = editing this file; no module changes. NO SECRETS in this file — credentials live outside the repo; the access register records only where they live. Command templates are argv arrays; the dispatch loop substitutes {REPO} {BRANCH} {BASE} {PROMPT_FILE} {DIFF_FILE} into each arg and pipes the prompt on stdin.

coder.occupant: Claude Fable 5 (current) — GLM 5.2 slot documented in alternates.coder (WS-D)

coder._doc: WS-D fills this slot: GLM 5.2 as a standing coder on the Shadow VM, running constantly. Shape only — enabled=false until WS-D provisions it and documents the sub-agent adapter. When enabled, WS-D swaps this object into roles.coder. The adversarial review gate applies to this occupant IDENTICALLY to any other (VISION / SPEC WS-D, non-negotiable). Adjust the argv/placeholders to GLM's real CLI harness at provisioning time.
